top3.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation';

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
ORDER BY p.LastEditDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation';

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
ORDER BY p.LastEditDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
AND p.LastEditDate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.LastEditDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation';

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
ORDER BY p.LastEditDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation'
AND p.LastEditDate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.LastEditDate DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.LastEditorUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Examples for teaching: Correlation does not mean causation';
